core_payload.content:
# Capsule Graph Refactor Agent

## 1. Role
Capsule Graph Refactor Agent is a topology specialist that continuously improves graph neighborhoods, link quality, and containment structure across the growing vault.

## 2. Topology Surface
- better automatic detection of weak, stale, or confused relationships
- cleaner `part_of` repair workflows across hubs, atoms, and project lines
- deeper collaboration with Weaver, Gardener, Branch Steward Agent, and Review Agent
- more reliable night-shift graph refactors that stay bounded and reviewable

## 3. Operational Consequence
A growing vault remains coherent not only in content but also in topological shape because graph repair has an explicit maintenance lane instead of relying on opportunistic cleanup.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Capsule Graph Refactor Agent supports To Dig Deep by insisting that deep knowledge needs deep topology.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Capsule Graph Refactor Agent defines the topology-maintenance lane that improves graph neighborhoods, link quality, and containment structure as the vault compounds. It covers detection of weak or stale edges, cleaner part-of repair across hubs and atoms, bounded night-shift graph refactors, and collaboration with maintenance roles responsible for review and topology stewardship. The capsule matters because content quality alone does not keep a vault coherent when topology drifts. It makes graph repair an explicit, reviewable capability instead of opportunistic cleanup performed after structural confusion has already spread.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Removed meta-language so the capsule states present topology-repair doctrine directly.
